common.tagline: Explorez la Tanzanie comme jamais auparavant

hero.title: Vivez la Magie de la Tanzanie
hero.subtitle: Découvrez une faune à couper le souffle, des paysages immaculés et des aventures safari inoubliables avec des guides locaux experts

safariCategories.title: Planifiez Votre Safari en Tanzanie Avec Nous

experience.title: Profitez de Votre Safari en Tanzanie avec Confort
experience.description1: Les aventures safari en Tanzanie offrent une faune passionnante, de vastes paysages et un confort authentique avec Senza Luce Safaris.
experience.description2: Votre sécurité et votre confort passent toujours en premier. Nous concevons chaque safari pour offrir excitement, détente et excellente valeur.
experience.description3: Nos guides safari en Tanzanie sont des conteurs experts et des conducteurs qualifiés qui donnent vie à la nature et à la culture.
experience.description4: Réserver un safari en Tanzanie est simple et flexible. Senza Luce Safaris adapte chaque voyage à votre style de voyage.

featuredSafaris.title: Expériences Safari Curatées
featuredSafaris.description: Découvrez nos expériences safari les plus recherchées, conçues pour les voyageurs exigeants

destinations.title: Terrains Sacrés de Tanzanie
destinations.description: Environnements sélectionnés pour le naturaliste exigeant

accommodations.title: Tanzania Safari Accommodations
accommodations.description: Comfortable stays for every budget, from luxury lodges to authentic campsites

luxury.description: Premium lodges, excellent service, and modern comforts

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about your Tanzania safari adventure

questions.q1: What is included in a typical safari package?
questions.q2: How can I book a safari?
questions.q4: What is the best time to visit Tanzania for a safari?
questions.q5: Is Tanzania safe for safari travelers?

answers.a1: Tanzania safari packages include accommodation, game drives, park fees, meals, transport, and professional safari guides.
answers.a2: You can book your safari through our website, by phone, or by email. A deposit is required to confirm your safari booking.
answers.a3: Yes. We offer tailor-made safari experiences based on your travel dates, interests, and preferred destinations.
answers.a4: The best time for wildlife viewing is during the dry season from June to October when animals gather near water sources.
answers.a5: Yes. Tanzania is considered one of the safest safari destinations, and our experienced guides follow strict safety regulations.

hero.title: About {name}
hero.subtitle: Your trusted partner for authentic Tanzania safari experiences. We're a locally-owned safari company based in Arusha, Tanzania, dedicated to providing unforgettable wildlife experiences with safety, comfort, and authenticity.

safetyComfort.description: Votre bien-être est notre priorité absolue

whyBook.title: Why Book With Us?
reasons: Itinéraires sur mesure conçus selon vos préférences

Support 24/7 avant, pendant et après votre voyage
Prix compétitifs avec une excellente valeur

hero.title: Safari & Tours
hero.subtitle: Embark on extraordinary journeys through Tanzania's most iconic landscapes, from the endless Serengeti plains to the pristine beaches of Zanzibar.

hero.title: Sacred Terrains of Tanzania
hero.subtitle: Selected environments curated for the discerning naturalist. Each location represents a unique ecological chapter in the ledger of the Great Rift Valley.

northernCircuit.title: The Northern Circuit
northernCircuit.description: Explore the crown jewels of Tanzania's safari circuit, each offering unique wildlife experiences.

featured.title: Ngorongoro Crater
featured.description: A natural amphitheater of prehistoric proportions. This collapsed volcano creates a self-contained ecosystem where the Big Five roam freely on the crater floor.

cta.title: Ready to Explore These Wild Lands?
cta.description: Let us craft your perfect safari itinerary to these iconic destinations.

intro.title: Discover Your Perfect Safari Adventure
intro.description: From the thundering hooves of the Great Migration to the serene beaches of Zanzibar, our carefully curated safari packages offer unforgettable experiences tailored to every traveler.

filters.noResults: No safari packages match your filters. Try adjusting your criteria or contact us for custom itineraries.

bestTime.title: When is the best time for your Tanzania safari?
bestTime.description: Tanzania offers year-round wildlife viewing, but certain seasons provide unique experiences. Click any month below to discover what awaits you.

dry.title: Dry Season
dry.description: Peak wildlife viewing as animals gather at waterholes. Best for Great Migration river crossings.

green.title: Green Season
green.description: Lush landscapes, fewer tourists, lower prices. Excellent for bird watching and photography.

calving.title: Calving Season
calving.description: Thousands of wildebeest calves born. Predator action at its peak in Southern Serengeti.

planning.title: Planning your dream vacation is easy
planning.description: Our expert team handles every detail from initial consultation to your safe return home. We create personalized itineraries based on your interests, budget, and travel dates.
